_**User (2026-05-25 18:34:18Z)**_

Can I easily see history of one file in git in visual code?

---

_**Agent (copilot/claude-sonnet-4.6)**_

Yes. Right-click the file in the Explorer panel and choose **Open Timeline** — or use the Timeline view at the bottom of the Explorer sidebar, which shows all git commits that touched the file.

You can also install the **GitLens** extension, which adds a much richer file history view with diff previews and blame annotations inline in the editor.
